span.p: Section 193: Punishment for false evidence (eff: 1872-01-01)

span.p: ALL OF (conjunctive)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Whoever gives false evidence in any stage of a judicial proceeding

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: The person intentionally gives that false evidence.

span.p: Whoever fabricates false evidence for the purpose of being used in any stage ...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: The false evidence is in any stage of a judicial proceeding.

span.p: Whoever gives false evidence in any other case

span.p: The false evidence is in any other case.
